query: SHOW COLUMNS FROM release_notes; SELECT rn.id, rn.title, rn.body, rn.status, rn.audience, rn.published_at, rn.created_at, COUNT(rna.id) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_notes rn LEFT JOIN release_note_acknowledgements rna ON rna.release_note_id = rn.id GROUP BY rn.id, rn.title, rn.body, rn.status, rn.audience, rn.published_at, rn.created_at ORDER BY rn.created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SHOW COLUMNS FROM release_notes; SELECT rn.id, rn.title, rn.body, rn.status, rn.audience, rn.published_at, rn.created_at, COUNT(rna.id) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_notes rn LEFT JOIN release_note_acknowledgements rna ON rna.release_note_id = rn.id GROUP BY rn.id, rn.title, rn.body, rn.status, rn.audience, rn.published_at, rn.created_at ORDER BY rn.created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
